title: Apple 官方解釋 iPhone X 發佈會 Face ID 功能演示失敗原因

replies.msg:
Face ID 人臉識別可謂 iPhone X 除屏幕外的最大革新，然而發佈會上的首次演示就以失敗告終，著實讓 Apple 有些「顏面掃地」，事故一出也開始導致公司股價快速下跌，那麼究竟是什麼原因導致這次失敗呢？Apple 日前終於發佈聲明，解釋說 Craig Federighi 在現場使用的 iPhone X，在進行 Face ID 演示前已有多人使用它演示別的功能，而在這些過程中 Face ID 試圖對每個人的面孔加以驗證，多次驗證失敗後便自動鎖定（與 Touch ID 相同），此時用戶只有通過密碼才能解鎖手機，因此當 Federighi 演示 Face ID 功能時，手機已經處於密碼模式，最終導致這次爭議。

Source: https://goo.gl/PjFpmj

即係部機俾唔同人望過幾次就會自動lock？

FaceID 比某個員工set咗
其他人又以為冇set走去用 失敗數次 要用passcode unlock
九成九係個員工拎錯咗機比佢做demo

嗰一個員工

蘋果於雅虎發文，解釋當日軟件工程高級副總裁 Craig Federighi 於台上示範使用 Face ID 時，只是因為手機在同時辨認多人的臉孔，令系統混亂，無法一開始就集中辨認 Craig 的臉孔，才會要求他輸入密碼解鎖。這個過程，有如我們使用 Touch ID 時，若系統多次無法辨認出指定指紋，就要求用家改為輸入密碼。安全機制完全一樣，並不是發布會當日 Face ID 壞掉了。

蘋果的解釋，似乎真的解開了為何 Craig 花了一點時間才成功解鎖 iPhone X。但是，這也令人起疑，究竟在人多擠逼的地方，利用 Face ID 解鎖手機，準繩度會有多高。當日於發布會上，可能是工程樣板機，系統反應上可能仍有不及，始終要到十一月正式推出時，才知道 Face ID 是實用還是雞肋。

https://pc3mag.com/iphone-x-face-id-demo-error/

https://techcrunch.com/2017/09/15/interview-apples-craig-federighi-answers-some-burning-questions-about-face-id/
If there are 5 failed attempts to Face ID, it will default back to passcode. (Federighi has confirmed that this is what happened in the demo onstage when he was asked for a passcode — it tried to read the people setting the phones up on the podium.)


http://www.idownloadblog.com/2017/09/15/craig-federighi-interview-face-id/

The user must also enter their passcode to reenable Face ID in any of the following cases:

The phone has just been turned on or restarted
The phone hasn’t been unlocked for more than 48 hours
After five unsuccessful attempts to match a face
The passcode hasn’t been used to unlock the phone in the last six and a half days (156 hours) and Face ID hasn’t unlocked the phone in the last four hours
The phone has received a remote lock command
When enrolling a face with Face ID

1/1000000 means 1/1000000 chance someone else's face will fool Face ID.
an狗唔識英文?

Touch ID locks a device after five failed attempts, but with Face ID, Apple is only allowing two failed attempts. After two incorrect scans, the iPhone X will lock and require your passcode to unlock again. You can also discretely disable Face ID by pressing the side button and volume buttons at the same time. This will lock it and require a passcode to access your device.

https://www.macrumors.com/2017/09/13/how-iphone-x-face-id-works/

When using Touch ID, multiple fingerprints can be added to a device so more than one person can unlock it. That is not possible with Face ID. Face ID makes a map of a single face and that's the only face that can unlock the iPhone X. To add a new face, the existing face must be removed.
咁啫話唔好認錯人兩次

https://www.macrumors.com/2017/09/13/how-iphone-x-face-id-works/

When using Touch ID, multiple fingerprints can be added to a device so more than one person can unlock it. That is not possible with Face ID. Face ID makes a map of a single face and that's the only face that can unlock the iPhone X. To add a new face, the existing face must be removed.
